queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical evidence on how a negative checking account balance contributes to reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with loan purposes for used vehicle purchases: an empirical analysis of lower default likelihood.
